precheck.description: Pre-pay risk & policy precheck for x402 agent payments. Send a 402 challenge (or payTo + amount) and get an allow/warn/block verdict with a risk score before you spend. Screens payee against denylist/flagged lists, flags price gouging vs. category bands, validates the asset/network/facilitator, and enforces your own spend policy.

challenge.description: The raw JSON body of the HTTP 402 response you received (with an `accepts` array), or a single PaymentRequirements object. If provided, payTo/amount/asset/network are parsed from it.

payTo.description: Destination address from the 402 envelope (e.g. 0x...). Required if `challenge` is not given.

amount.description: Price in USD the endpoint is asking for (e.g. 0.01). Use this OR maxAmountRequired.

maxAmountRequired.description: Price in atomic token units (alternative to `amount`); converted using the asset's decimals.

asset.description: Settlement asset symbol (e.g. 'USDC') or token contract address.

network.description: Settlement network (e.g. 'base', 'solana'). Required if `challenge` is not given.

resource.description: The endpoint URL being paid for (used for context and reputation).

facilitator.description: Facilitator URL or host from the 402 envelope.

category.description: Service category hint for price-band comparison.

policy.description: Optional caller spend policy enforced against this payment.

allowlist.description: If set, payTo must be one of these addresses.

blocklist.description: payTo must not be one of these addresses.

maxRiskScore.description: Block if the computed risk score (0-100) exceeds this.

priceBand.description: p50 / p90 / max USD band for the category.

checks.description: Itemized check results (id, label, status, detail).

flags.description: IDs of checks that warned or failed.
